articles.title: What businesses in Boston are worth waiting in line for?
articles.description:
Boston.com compiled a list of some Boston businesses where you're most likely to see a line out the door.

The post What businesses in Boston are worth waiting in line for? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston.com lists top businesses with long lines, indicating high demand among locals.
Popular spots include Flour Bakery and Mike's Pastry, known for their iconic treats.
Long wait times reflect community loyalty and support for local businesses.

articles.title: Mass. woman pleads guilty to performing medical spa injections using counterfeit products
articles.description:
The spa owner received more than $1 million in client payments for her procedures despite not being licensed to perform them.

The post Mass. woman pleads guilty to performing medical spa injections using counterfeit products appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts woman pleads guilty to unauthorized medical spa injections.
Spa owner earned over $1 million from clients without a medical license.
Local residents may face health risks from counterfeit injection products.

articles.title: Man fatally shot by Boston police near Northeastern University campus identified
articles.description:
Police response to a man’s mental health crisis turned chaotic Saturday, resulting in multiple injured officers and emergency responders.

The post Man fatally shot by Boston police near Northeastern University campus identified appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston police shot a man during a mental health crisis near Northeastern University on Saturday.
Multiple officers and emergency responders sustained injuries during the chaotic incident.
The incident raises concerns about police response to mental health emergencies in Boston.

articles.title: Celtics’ Brad Stevens addresses ‘tiresome’ college basketball rumors
articles.description:
Stevens said he's flattered by interest from college programs, but is not planning to leave the Celtics.

The post Celtics’ Brad Stevens addresses ‘tiresome’ college basketball rumors appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Brad Stevens confirmed he will remain with the Celtics amid college coaching rumors.
Stevens expressed flattery over interest from college programs but dismissed the speculation.
Celtics fans can expect stability as Stevens focuses on the NBA season ahead.

articles.title: Man gets life sentence in 2024 killing of Boston father of 2
articles.description:
“There were other ways this situation could and should have been handled, but those other ways were left unexplored. One life was ended and another dramatically altered as a result,” Hayden said.

The post Man gets life sentence in 2024 killing of Boston father of 2 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Man sentenced to life for 2024 murder of Boston father of two.
Judge Hayden highlighted missed opportunities for conflict resolution before the killing.
The incident has left the victim's family and community deeply affected.

articles.title: US and Iran agree to 2-week ceasefire as Trump seizes diplomatic offramp instead of escalation
articles.description:
Trump said he was holding off on his threatened attacks on Iranian bridges, power plants and other civilian targets, subject to Tehran agreeing to a two-week ceasefire and reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

The post US and Iran agree to 2-week ceasefire as Trump seizes diplomatic offramp instead of escalation appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trump announces a two-week ceasefire with Iran to avoid military escalation.
Ceasefire includes reopening of the strategic Strait of Hormuz for shipping.
Boston residents may see reduced oil prices due to decreased tensions in the Middle East.

articles.title: Lindsay Clancy will admit to killing her children if trial is split into 2 parts, defense says
articles.description:
Clancy’s defense team has filed a motion to reconsider a previous bid for a multi-phase trial, which was denied last week.

The post Lindsay Clancy will admit to killing her children if trial is split into 2 parts, defense says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Lindsay Clancy's defense seeks a split trial to admit guilt in her children's deaths.
The motion for a multi-phase trial was previously denied last week.
A split trial could significantly affect the legal proceedings in Boston.

articles.title: Patriots trade Marte Mapu to Houston Texans
articles.description:
The Patriots will receive Houston’s 2027 sixth-round draft pick in exchange for Mapu and a 2027 seventh-rounder.

The post Patriots trade Marte Mapu to Houston Texans appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots trade linebacker Marte Mapu to Houston Texans on April 7, 2026.
New England receives a 2027 sixth-round draft pick and a seventh-rounder in return.
This trade impacts the Patriots' roster strategy and future draft plans for Boston fans.

articles.title: Suspicious person prompts lockdown, canceled classes at R.I. college
articles.description:
“All classes and activities on the Warwick Campus are canceled for the remainder of the day and evening,” the college posted to social media. 

The post Suspicious person prompts lockdown, canceled classes at R.I. college appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Warwick Campus canceled all classes and activities due to a suspicious person on April 7.
The lockdown affected students and staff, disrupting their daily schedules and plans.
Local authorities are investigating the incident to ensure community safety.

articles.title: Red Sox get more bad news after Triston Casas suffers setback in his recovery
articles.description:
"Casas tried to swing. It didn’t go well."

The post Red Sox get more bad news after Triston Casas suffers setback in his recovery appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Triston Casas faced a setback in recovery after attempting to swing on April 7.
Casas' injury prolongs his absence, impacting Red Sox lineup depth and performance.
Fans may see reduced offensive output as the team navigates injuries this season.
